artifact_turing_award: Turing Award is the most prestigious award in computer science. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_fields_medal: Fields Medal is the most prestigious award in mathematics, awarded every four years. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_abel_prize: Abel Prize is the prestigious mathematics prize awarded annually. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_nobel_prize_in_physics: Nobel Prize in Physics is the Nobel Prize for physics achievements (2024 awarded to Hopfield/Hinton). Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_nobel_prize_in_chemistry: Nobel Prize in Chemistry is the Nobel Prize for chemistry achievements (2024 awarded to Hassabis/Jumper for AlphaFold). Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_gdel_prize: Gödel Prize is the prize for outstanding papers in theoretical computer science. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_acm_prize_in_computing: ACM Prize in Computing is aCM's highest award for early-career computer scientists. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_ijcai_computers_and_thought_awa: IJCAI Computers and Thought Award is iJCAI's award for early-career AI research. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_macarthur_fellowship: MacArthur Fellowship is the 'genius grant' awarded to creative individuals. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_ieee_medal_of_honor: IEEE Medal of Honor is iEEE's highest award. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_knuth_prize: Knuth Prize is the prize for outstanding contributions to theoretical computer science. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_dijkstra_prize: Dijkstra Prize is the prize for outstanding papers in distributed computing. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_acm_software_system_award: ACM Software System Award is aCM's award for software systems with lasting impact. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_marconi_prize: Marconi Prize is the prize for contributions to information and communications science. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
artifact_test_of_time_award: Test of Time Award is the awards given by major venues for highly-cited papers a decade later. Major awards are universally recognized within their fields and achieve broad LLM recognition through annual coverage and historical citation.
